description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in (no API key needed)

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather for a city or location. Returns temperature, conditions, wind, and a 3-day forecast.

location.description: City name, airport code, or coordinates (e.g. 'Berlin', 'JFK', '48.8566,2.3522')

units.description: Temperature units — metric (°C) or imperial (°F). Default: metric.
